info.description: Leadership grid on /vision. Upload a headshot and bio for each person.

name.description: Full name shown on the card, e.g. Mike Dinsdale.

role.description: Job title shown under the name, e.g. Chief Executive Officer.

headshot.description: Headshot photo. Square images look best.

bioFormat.description: How the bio is displayed: 'prose' = paragraphs (fill in Bio prose), 'bullets' = a bulleted list (fill in Bio bullets).

bioProse.description: Paragraph-style biography. Used when Bio format is 'prose'.

bioBullets.description: Bulleted biography — one bullet per row. Used when Bio format is 'bullets'.

order.description: Display order on the page (lower numbers show first).
